label: The Sealed Storeroom
description: The Sealed Storeroom forms a compact interior chamber within the Ironwrit Lodgings, set behind a thick plank door bound in iron and fitted with a double-hasp for inspection seals. Salvaged ashlar walls bear chalked inventory tallies and faded hazard placards copied from Varric Holdfast’s interdiction posts, preserved under a thin wash to resist alteration. Narrow shelving of dark, planed timber lines the perimeter, with a low counting bench fixed to the floor to prevent removal. The air remains dry and papery, and the space is organized to favor audit and custody over comfort or convenience.
